report.summary: UX polish cycle for 3 new learn guides — converted static FAQs to accordion pattern, added ARIA landmarks and semantic navigation, removed hardcoded backgrounds, and verified OG image coverage via dynamic API.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Sui Blockchain Guide: Removed hardcoded backgroundColor (#0d1117) — now inherits site-wide theme
Sui Blockchain Guide: Converted 4 static FAQ items to <details>/<summary> accordion pattern with glass card styling
Sui Blockchain Guide: Added ARIA role='list' + aria-label to key metrics grid (6 items)
Sui Blockchain Guide: Added role='listitem' + aria-label to all 6 metric cards for screen reader support
Sui Blockchain Guide: Added scope='col' to both table headers (tokenomics + comparison tables)
Sui Blockchain Guide: Wrapped Continue Learning section in semantic <nav> with aria-label
Sui Blockchain Guide: Added minHeight 44px to all related article link cards for touch targets
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: Removed hardcoded backgroundColor (#0d1117)
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: Converted 4 static FAQ items to <details>/<summary> accordion pattern
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: Added scope='col' to all 9 table header cells across 2 tables
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: Wrapped Related Articles in semantic <nav> with aria-label
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: Added minHeight 44px to all 5 related article link cards

sections.title: OG Image Verification
items: All 5 new pages use dynamic /api/og endpoint — no static OG images needed
Sui Blockchain Guide: OG verified (type=learn, blue gradient + book icon)
Portfolio Rebalancing Guide: OG verified (type=learn)
DAO Governance Guide: OG verified (type=learn) — previously polished in v6
Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide: OG verified (type=learn) — previously polished in v6
Crypto Oracles Guide: OG verified (type=learn) — already had accordion FAQ, ARIA, semantic nav, BackToTop

sections.title: Pages Already Polished (No Changes Needed)
items: Crypto Oracles Guide: Already uses Tailwind + CSS vars, accordion FAQ, ARIA landmarks, semantic <nav>, BackToTop — best-in-class template
DAO Governance Guide: Previously updated in design-v6 cycle
Cross-Chain Interoperability Guide: Previously updated in design-v6 cycle
